creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 153137
takes MAINTAINERship of this port

I'm going to submit a port that provides a GUI
for this, as well as a GIMP plugin that incorporates
this port. As a result, in the near future, I would
like to add options to this port, that will allow
making those ports, as part of this.
So I would like to maintain this port.

Changes in this PR:
Makefile: takes MAINTAINER

That's it! :)

Thanks!

--Chris
